title: SearchResults
description: Structured product-card data parsed from one New World search-results page (mirrors the WIT `search-results` record in common/wit/html-parser.wit). Optional WIT fields are required-but-nullable.

site.description: The site this parser understands; always "new-world"

source-url.description: The URL the page was fetched from, echoed back verbatim

next-page-url.description: The first a[rel=next] link resolved against the source URL, or null when the page has none

products.description: Product cards in document order, deduplicated by canonical URL
